cadence_note: The fastest-moving resources update monthly: LAUS unemployment estimates (4e3w-qire) and CES employment/hours/earnings (pt2g-89wc) land a few weeks after the reference month; QCEW (cjkq-q9ih) lands quarterly. The Colorado Information Marketplace publishes no fixed per-resource release calendar, so a weekly re-fetch picks those up within days of publication. The rest are slower (OES wages annually, projections per vintage) or frozen vintages (bu8h-8sux is the 2015 population table, bynd-i2hj the 2014 CPI table, jnj7-fw37 a reference corpus Socrata marks 'Never' updated); a weekly no-op re-fetch on those is cheap.
